summary: Completed testing of session persistence and new features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Fixed missing /api/educator/my-application endpoint.
passed_tests: Frontend: Student login with phone 9999999999 and OTP 1111
Frontend: Student redirected to /my-bookings after login
Frontend: Student session persists after page refresh
Frontend: Educator login with phone 7777777777 and OTP 1111
Frontend: Educator redirected to /educator-dashboard after login
Frontend: Educator session persists after page refresh
Frontend: Educator dashboard shows 'Available for new demos' toggle
Frontend: Educator availability toggle changes to 'Go Unavailable'
Frontend: Educator availability toggle works both ways
Frontend: Centers page shows 'Want to Open Your Own OLL Center?' section
Frontend: Centers page has 'Become a Growth Partner' button
Frontend: Clicking 'Become a Growth Partner' navigates to /growth-partner page
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added /api/educator/my-application endpoint (was missing, frontend was calling it but backend only had /api/educators/my-application)
/app/tests/test_session_and_features.py - Created new test file for session persistence and features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Session persistence for Student login - login with 9999999999/1111, navigate to /my-bookings, refresh page - stays logged in. 2) Session persistence for Educator login - login with 7777777777/1111, navigate to /educator-dashboard, refresh page - stays logged in. 3) Educator availability toggle - visible on dashboard with 'Available for new demos' text and 'Go Unavailable' button, clicking toggles to 'Not accepting new demos' with 'Go Available' button. 4) Growth Partner CTA on Centers page - orange section at bottom with 'Want to Open Your Own OLL Center?' heading and 'Become a Growth Partner' button that navigates to /growth-partner. 5) Incomplete demo endpoint - POST /api/educator/incomplete-demo/{inquiry_id} exists and works (returns 404 for non-existent demos, 403 for unassigned demos). Fixed bug: Added missing /api/educator/my-application endpoint to backend.

mocked_apis_list: OTP verification - uses 1111 as test OTP (not real SMS/WhatsApp)
WhatsApp notification for incomplete demo - may fail if AiSensy campaign not configured

Session_Persistence_Student.details: Login with phone 9999999999 and OTP 1111, navigate to /my-bookings, refresh page - user stays logged in. Session stored in localStorage (oll_user key).

Session_Persistence_Educator.details: Login with phone 7777777777 and OTP 1111, navigate to /educator-dashboard, refresh page - user stays logged in. Session stored in localStorage (oll_user and oll_token keys).

Educator_Availability_Toggle.details: On educator dashboard, green section shows 'Available for new demos' with 'Go Unavailable' button. Clicking toggles to orange section with 'Not accepting new demos' and 'Go Available' button. Toast notifications confirm the change.

Growth_Partner_CTA_Centers_Page.details: At bottom of /centers page, orange gradient section with 'Want to Open Your Own OLL Center?' heading, description text, and 'Become a Growth Partner' button that navigates to /growth-partner page.

Incomplete_Demo_Endpoint.details: POST /api/educator/incomplete-demo/{inquiry_id} endpoint exists. Returns 404 for non-existent demos, 403 for demos not assigned to the educator. Updates inquiry status to 'incomplete' with reason.

endpoint_mismatch.issue: Frontend EducatorDashboard.jsx was calling /api/educator/my-application but backend only had /api/educators/my-application
endpoint_mismatch.fix: Added /api/educator/my-application endpoint to server.py as an alias
